$schema-note: Counts-only baseline for scripts/check-knip-baseline.ts. Each key maps to the per-file array name in knip --reporter json. CI fails if any current count exceeds the matching baseline. Update procedure: docs/runbooks/ci.md §6.
capturedFromCommit: kh-prod-readiness-S24 W6.1 Wave A — Knip baseline cleanup: closes the +6 unused-types CI breach (295→285) introduced over S21–S23 cross-track absorbs. Deletes 10 GENUINELY-DEAD type aliases (lib/taxonomy/taxonomy.ts ContentType+Platform; types/digest.ts DigestConfig+DigestGenerateRequest; types/review.ts ReviewActionType+ReviewAction+ReviewSession; types/bid.ts BidQuestionRow+BidResponseRow+WorkspaceRow) and 1 dead export (lib/governance/presets.ts GOVERNANCE_PRESETS const — governance UI reads from DB, S20). Tailwind v4 CSS-first plugin activation gap closed: knip.config.ts now provides syncCompilers.css regex extracting @plugin/@import directives from app/globals.css (Jimmy Guzman pattern), so @tailwindcss/typography is correctly detected via virtual JS imports rather than false-positive on the unused-dependency list (drops dependencies 1→0). Same change consolidated dormant knip.json into knip.config.ts (knip.json took precedence and shadowed knip.config.ts; deleted knip.json). Wave B (PUBLIC-API marking + RECENT-IMPL-ORPHAN wiring) deferred per docs/audits/kh-production-readiness-phase-1/research/19-knip-baseline-triage.md §9.
